user_outcome: Give English-language readers a source-oriented explanation of traditional Wu Xing correspondences among phases, zang-fu systems, seasons, directions and emotions without presenting them as biomedical diagnosis or treatment.
search_intent: Informational: understand Wu Xing organ correspondences and their historical limits.
page_promise: Explain what the traditional organ correspondences mean, where they appear in classical literature, how translations vary, and what they cannot establish medically.
sections: What organ language means in this context
review_requirements: runtime mobile and keyboard review before release
assumptions: DYAI2025/WX-learning is the target repository because it owns the canonical Wu Xing hub and already provides the applicable Caddy/Railway architecture.
BZG-29 and BZG-30 remain open, so their intended IA and claims rules are implemented locally but not represented as completed dependencies.
The canonical Sizhu Atelier domain remains the public identity even if an operational Railway URL is used for preview or deployment verification.
